pyqgis_plugin.name: TUFLOW Studio
pyqgis_plugin.description: TUFLOW project management: root paths, file editor, run logs, and BC input comparison
pyqgis_plugin.about: Docked panel plugin for TUFLOW modellers with project folder tracking, control file editor with syntax checking, run log extraction, and a BC Inputs tab to compare hydrograph and rainfall data across events.
pyqgis_plugin.changelog: v1.2.0: Added Inputs tab to compare hydrograph/rainfall from BC database as a matplotlib chart; Editor now includes .bat files; file list grouped by extension
